name: Golden Apple Pie with Rum Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the apples with brown sugar, flour, spices (cinnamon, salt, nutmeg), and mix well.
2. Place the mixture in a prepared 9-inch pie plate.
3. Flute the edges of the crust.
4. Sprinkle the apples with chopped nuts and rum; dot with butter.
5. Roll out the remaining pastry and cut into 3-inch strips.
6. Arrange the strips in a lattice pattern on top of the pie.
7. Bake at 425°F for 50 to 60 minutes, or until the apples are tender.
8. Cover part of the top crust halfway through baking time to prevent over-browning.
